overview: Boutique urology practice specializing in men's sexual health and genitourinary conditions. Offers treatments including penile implants, Peyronie's disease management, vasectomy, and minimally invasive prostate procedures in a private facility.
highlights: Center of Excellence for Boston Scientific and Coloplast penile implants
In-office girth enhancement and Rezum procedures
targetAudience: Men with urological and sexual health concerns throughout the Southwest.
